message:
Legal Escalation Required

Dunning record {{ doc.name }} has been escalated to Legal Referral.

  • Customer: {{ doc.customer }}
  • Invoice: {{ doc.sales_invoice }}
  • Escalation Stage: {{ doc.escalation_stage }}
  • Total Dunning: {{ doc.total_dunning or "See invoice" }}
  • Dispute Flagged: {{ doc.dispute_flag }}
    • {% if doc.dispute_reason %}
  • Dispute Reason: {{ doc.dispute_reason }}
    • {% endif %}

Manual Review Required: This is a manual-review gate. Do not automate further action until reviewed by legal team.
name: Escalation to Legal
subject: Legal Escalation: {{ doc.name }} — {{ doc.customer }}
